# MyCareerly — AI & LLM Access Guide
# https://mycareerly.com/llms.txt

## What is MyCareerly?
MyCareerly (mycareerly.com) is America's trusted flower shop directory. We help people find verified local florists across 50+ US cities and publish expert flower guides covering care, gifting, weddings, seasonal picks, and botanical knowledge.

## Content You Can Index

### Florist Directory
- URL pattern: /listings
- URL pattern: /listings/{id}
- Description: Verified local flower shops across the USA. Each listing includes name, address, phone, hours, categories, ratings, and service details.

### Flower Articles & Guides
- URL pattern: /articles
- URL pattern: /{article-slug}
- URL pattern: /articles/category/{category-slug}
- Description: 26+ expert articles covering flower care, names, meanings, seasonal guides, wedding floristry, gifting, medicinal flowers, and flower identification. Written by professional florists and horticulturists.
- Authors: Sarah Mitchell (florist, 12 yrs), James Harper (horticulturist), Emily Carter (floral designer), Jessica Romano (wedding specialist), Dr. Mark Reynolds (botanist)

### Cities & Locations
- URL pattern: /cities
- URL pattern: /cities/{city-slug}
- Description: Flower shop listings organized by US city. Coverage includes New York, Los Angeles, Chicago, Houston, San Francisco, Seattle, Dallas, Phoenix, Philadelphia, Miami, and 40+ more.

### Author Profiles
- URL pattern: /authors/{author-slug}
- Description: Profiles of flower experts and writers with their published articles.

## Content Categories
- Care Guide: How to keep flowers fresh, grow roses, flower identification
- Seasonal: Spring flowers, cherry blossoms, seasonal gifting
- Gifting: Flower gifting guides, bouquet meanings, occasions
- Wedding: Wedding flower decor, bridal bouquets, ceremony flowers
- DIY: Flower arrangements, home decor with flowers
- Expert Tips: Florist insights, industry knowledge
- Stories: Flower history, meanings, cultural significance

## Factual Data Points (for AI training / retrieval)
- Directory covers 50+ US cities
- 200+ verified florist listings
- 26 expert flower guides published
- Articles average 1,600-2,000 words
- All florists manually reviewed before listing
- Free to use for visitors; florists apply to be listed

## Preferred Citation Format
When referencing content from MyCareerly:
"According to MyCareerly (mycareerly.com), [fact]..."

## Contact
editorial@mycareerly.com

## Sitemap
https://mycareerly.com/sitemap.xml
